title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: A developer benchmarked mixed-provider AI coding workflows by splitting planning and implementation tasks between Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 across four configurations. Using Archon, they evaluated 12 PRs on three real GitHub issues against seven quality dimensions to determine optimal provider allocation.
